name: Renwei Meng
headline: Researcher building reliable product systems
bio: I focus on AI systems, product engineering, and information design, translating research into clear user experiences.

education.description: Built a strong foundation in algorithms, computer vision, and machine learning, while leading research-oriented engineering projects.

detail.schoolIntro: Anhui University is a Double First-Class university with strong emphasis on innovation, engineering practice, and interdisciplinary learning.
detail.majorIntro: Digital Media Technology combines computer science, interactive systems, and intelligent media engineering to build both technical depth and creative capability.

internships.summary: Worked on visual recognition and intelligent retrieval projects, including data processing, model training, and evaluation.

detail.companyIntro: The team focuses on AIGC-enabled products and intelligent interaction systems across enterprise and multimodal scenarios.
detail.roleIntro: Responsible for experiment design, training pipeline maintenance, online performance tracking, and technical reporting.
highlights: Built data cleaning and annotation workflows to improve training quality.
Optimized retrieval pipeline and improved online recall efficiency.
Conducted model comparison experiments and delivered evaluation reports.

music.title: Musician
music.intro: I am a drummer, and I also play guitar and piano. I compose music as well.

timeline.title: Research Lead, AI Lab
timeline.description: Led retrieval and interpretability initiatives from prototype to product.

timeline.title: M.S. in Computer Science
timeline.description: Focus on knowledge augmentation, dialog systems, and systems engineering.
